headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Dow (DOW) After Its Strong Year To Date Rally?
summary: For investors wondering whether Dow at around US$38.78 is still offering value or if most of the opportunity has already played out, this article walks through key signals to help you judge for yourself. The stock is up 3.9% over the past week, roughly flat over the past month with a 1.0% decline, and has returned 59.8% year to date and 38.5% over the past year. Longer periods such as 3 and 5 years show declines of 10.7% and 25.4%. Recent news flow around Dow has focused on how investors are...

headline: Global Diethyl Ketone Market Outlook 2026-2036: Pharmaceutical Demand Accelerates Growth for Dow Inc., Arkema S.A., and Mitsui Chemicals
summary: According to the latest market analysis by Future Market Insights, the global Diethyl Ketone Market is projected to grow from USD 531.8 million in 2025 to USD 836.1 million by 2036, expanding at a CAGR of 4.2% during the forecast period. the market expansion is being driven by rising demand for controlled-performance solvents across pharmaceuticals, coatings, agrochemicals, and specialty chemical processing.
